title: 10X TBS Buffer Preparation
author: Bryon Drown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bd85i9y6
materials: Weigh out 3.13 g of Tris base.
Weigh out 27.45 g of Tris HCl.
Weigh out 88 g of sodium chloride.

steps.title: Dissolve in water
steps.instruction: Dissolve the weighed reagents in 900 mL of MilliQ water.

steps.title: Adjust pH
steps.instruction: Measure the pH and adjust to 7.5 using concentrated HCl and/or NaOH.

steps.title: Bring to final volume
steps.instruction: Add MilliQ water to a final volume of 1 L.
